en: Murugan here is called Vijayvel Murugan.
ta: iṅku murukaṉai vijayavel murukaṉ eṉṟu aḻaikkiṟārkaḷ.

en: There are no more texts in the Tulu writing.

en: He went into the acting industry in his twelfth.

ta: avar eṉṉuṭaiya tolaikkāṭciyil nikaḻccikaḷai tayārittu vaḻaṅkiṉār.

en: The great civilizations in the world are on the banks of rivers.
